spells.name: Ember Lance
spells.description: The first offensive flame an Apprentice learns — a thrown lance of ember that teaches focus through heat.
spells.effect: Single-target fire damage at range; ignites flammable cover.

spells.name: Frostpierce
spells.description: Water drawn to a needle's point and frozen mid-flight — the Mage's precise, piercing strike.
spells.effect: Armor-piercing cold damage; slows the target one round.

spells.name: Tempest Rend
spells.description: A Master splits the air into cutting blades that rake a whole line of advance.
spells.effect: Line-area wind damage; disarms lightly held weapons.

spells.name: Radiant Verdict
spells.description: Spirit-light called through the Crown Gate that burns only what is corrupt — sacred fire that judges before it harms.
spells.effect: Single-target Spirit damage that bypasses wards on Shadow-corrupted foes.

spells.name: Throne-Shatter
spells.description: Dominion-grade earth magic that breaks the ground a rival's power stands on — a strike aimed at thrones, not soldiers.
spells.effect: Wide-area earth rupture; collapses fortifications and summoned terrain.

spells.name: Cataclysm Crown
spells.description: Realm-scale fire commanded by an emergent Luminor — a crown of flame that answers to will alone.
spells.effect: Persistent area conflagration the caster steers across a battlefield for several rounds.

spells.name: The Unmaking
spells.description: Void drawn through all ten open Gates — Nero's unformed potential turned, briefly, into erasure. The rarest and most disciplined of attacks.
spells.effect: Removes a target effect, summon, or construct from existence; cannot touch a living soul.

spells.name: Stoneskin Veil
spells.description: The Foundation Gate's first ward — a thin sheath of stone that teaches the Apprentice to stand firm.
spells.effect: Adds physical damage reduction to the caster for several rounds.

spells.name: Tideheal
spells.description: Water as memory, returning a body to the shape it remembers — the Mage's restorative tide.
spells.effect: Restores vitality to one ally over three rounds; clears minor afflictions.

spells.name: Aegis of Light
spells.description: A Master weaves Spirit into a standing shield that turns aside what is thrown at the whole circle.
spells.effect: Area ward that abjures incoming Attack spells of Greater tier or lower.

spells.name: Sacred Restoration
spells.description: Restoration called through the Crown Gate — water and Spirit together, mending what ordinary healing cannot reach.
spells.effect: Fully restores one ally and lifts curses up to Sacred tier.

spells.name: Bulwark Royal
spells.description: A dominion-grade rampart of living stone that shelters an entire host — the wall kings are remembered by.
spells.effect: Raises a persistent fortress ward over a large area; absorbs siege-scale damage.

spells.name: Sanctuary Imperial
spells.description: An emergent Luminor folds wind and Spirit into a realm-wide refuge where no hostile working may take hold.
spells.effect: Realm-scale sanctuary that suppresses Attack and hostile Summoning of Imperial tier or lower.

spells.name: Covenant of Dawn
spells.description: With all ten Gates open, a Luminor binds Lumina's light into a covenant — a protection that outlasts the caster.
spells.effect: Permanent ward on a place or people until the covenant's terms are broken; immune to Shadow corruption.

spells.name: Call Wisp
spells.description: The Apprentice's first companion — a wind-wisp that scouts, carries light, and teaches the discipline of the name-binding.
spells.effect: Summons a minor wind familiar for reconnaissance and small tasks.

spells.name: Summon Ember Hound
spells.description: A loyal hound of living ember — the Mage's first true conjured ally, fierce and short-lived.
spells.effect: Summons a fire beast that fights for several rounds before returning to ash.

spells.name: Conjure Tide Serpent
spells.description: A serpent woven from tide and memory that coils around a battlefield — the Master's enduring summon.
spells.effect: Summons a large water construct that grapples and drowns; persists while the Master concentrates.

spells.name: Bind Vael Shade
spells.incantation: Per Portam Septimam — Voco Umbra Vael
spells.description: Through the Crown Gate an Archmage binds an unformed Vael shade — Nero's potential given temporary shape and service. Sacred because it must be released cleanly.
spells.effect: Summons a void servitor that phases through matter to strike or scout; must be dismissed by the caster.

spells.name: Summon Stone Colossus
spells.description: A dominion-grade guardian of mountain-stone that stands a siege alone — the colossus monarchs summon to hold a gate.
spells.effect: Summons a massive earth construct with siege-scale durability that holds a position for the battle.

spells.name: Call the Godbeast's Echo
spells.incantation: Per Portas Novem — Voco Echo Draconis
spells.description: Not the Godbeast itself — never that — but its echo, called by an emergent Luminor with Draconia as witness. A realm-scale ally for a single, decisive hour.
spells.effect: Summons a fire Godbeast-echo of immense power for a limited duration; cannot be commanded to harm its bonded God.

spells.name: Invoke the Tenth Gate
spells.description: The highest summoning: with the Source Gate open, a Luminor calls a chorus of Spirit-forms into being. Shinkami stands witness; the working is co-creation, not command.
spells.effect: Summons a host of Spirit constructs that act in harmony with the caster's intent until dawn.
